deckType.description: Deck type used by this adaptation.

mappings.description: Card-to-meaning mappings used by this adaptation.

meaning.description: Meaning or role assigned to the source card.

quantity.description: How many of this mapped card are needed.

sourceCard.description: Source card or component being mapped.

bodyMd.example: Works well with kids if you shorten the rounds.

parentId.description: Parent comment UUID when replying to another comment.

assets.description: Images, manuals, printables or other assets.

cardAdaptations.description: Card/deck adaptations for playing with common decks.

categoryIds.description: Category UUIDs assigned to the game.

indoor.description: Whether the game can be played indoors.

materials.description: Required and optional materials for the game.

outdoor.description: Whether the game can be played outdoors.

rulesMd.example: Players alternate marking X or O. The first to complete a row wins.

rulesSourceUrl.description: External source for rules or manual reference.

slug.description: URL-safe slug. If omitted, it is generated from the title.

summaryMd.example: A fast alignment game on a 3 by 3 grid.

publicUrl.description: Public URL for manually referenced assets.

sourceType.description: Where the asset is stored or referenced from.

sourceUrl.description: Original source URL used for attribution.

storageProvider.description: Object storage provider when sourceType is object_storage.

materialId.description: Material UUID required or optionally used by the game.

notes.description: Notes about how the material is used.

requirementType.description: Whether this material is required or optional.

limit.description: Maximum number of games to return.

materialIds.description: Material UUIDs owned by the player.

materialSlugs.description: Material slugs owned by the player.

outdoorOnly.description: When true, only return games playable outdoors.

query.description: Text search against title, summary and rules.

comment.description: Optional user comment for the rating.

userId.description: UUID of the user rating the game.
